name: HWR_SRVY_RESPONSES
description:
This table will be used to store the responses from Surveys as they are submitted by
the participants. This will be used for all the three types of questions: Text, single selection, multiple selection.

primary_keys.name: HWR_SRVY_RESPONSES_PK
primary_keys.columns: SURVEY_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION, QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_VERSION, PARTICIPANT_PRFL_ID

columns.Name: SURVEY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Survey Id identifying the Survey entry in this table.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID of this Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Question ID associated with the Questionnaire.

columns.Name: QUESTION_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Question Version associated with the Question ID in the Questionnaire.

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Fusion Id of the participant who took this Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: This determines the type of this question.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_ID_SINGLE_CHOICE
columns.Comments: This is the Answer ID associated with the question that the participant selected.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_ID_MLT_CHOICE
columns.Comments: This is a comma separated list of Answer ID(s) associated with the question that the participant selected.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_TEXT
columns.Comments: This is the response text that the participant wrote for the associated Question.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: RESPONSE_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: RESPONSE_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: RESPONSE_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: RESPONSE_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: SURVEY_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION, QUESTION_ID, QUESTION_VERSION, PARTICIPANT_PRFL_ID
